summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ideaGround platform. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% pass rate), but frontend authentication flow has critical issues preventing access to protected routes.

integration_issues.issue: All protected routes (dashboard, video player, portfolio, wallet) redirect to landing page despite valid session cookie
Frontend not properly recognizing session_token cookie for authentication

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all required buttons
All 21 backend API endpoints working correctly
Portfolio and wallet endpoints via API
Landing page UI elements and design
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend authentication flow. The ProtectedRoute component and useAuth hook are not properly handling session_token cookies, causing all protected routes to redirect to landing page. Backend authentication works perfectly, but frontend cannot access authenticated pages.
